creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* Thanks to Frank, Lars and Satoshi for insisting that there *is* a
 * bug, for hints and tests.

You're welcome.  Just to let you know, I rebuilt xview-lib with the
latest patches, and it works fine here too (where it didn't work even
with -current packages).

Thanks for the fix. :)

Satoshi
